programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee's nephew Dudley comes to stay. He's one cute puppy, but he looks like he could cause chaos in the clubhouse. The squirrels come up with lots of imaginative ways to entertain him.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: When Spyke introduces Neville to his alter ego Daredevil Neville, her fun-filled Splash Bash take a dangerous turn.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When a class tour of the airport goes wrong, it's up to Norman to use his gaming skills to control FireSwift until the Rescue Team arrives!

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Lucky Four Leaf Clover
programme.desc: When Benjamin finds a four-leaf clover, Peter tricks him into thinking it brings good luck. It's harmless fun until Peter's prank accidentally leads Lily into Mr Tod's dangerous clutches.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: Tango leads the Nature Explorers to a bird's nest, and to their surprise, they found something even more exciting - a robin family!

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Daniel is very excited when Prince Tuesday returns home from college for a visit. Prince Wednesday, however, is upset that Daniel is paying more attention to his big brother than to him.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Nim has dreams of becoming an opera singer. Between singing practice, she makes a scurry bug, a baked stained-glass window cookie and a monster cushion.

programme.title: Play School
programme.desc: Alex, Rachael, Kiya and Jemima fly the Explorer Mobile to the moon. Dr Karl and Rachael have fun testing the Bottle Diver experiment. Through the windows, we explore a colourful coral reef.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Start the day in the sunshine with 'The Garden Dance (The Ants Are Marching)'. Tsehay shares her rap with Lucia, then Simon, Lachy, and Anthony sing with dancing roses for Dorothy.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: Big World!
programme.desc: Thomas meets another big blue engine in Brazil that reminds him of Gordon.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: At the end of a library trip and agreeing to meet Rosa at the front entrance, Tish realises she needs help finding a book about pyramids.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish, Cori and Tobby visit Jeffy's house. Jeffy, unfortunately, is not in a good mood due to a damaged toy. Tish, Cori and Tobby decide they'll work together to cheer her up.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger's baby Broccolisaurus friend kicks their ball into Potatodon territory. Now they have challenge the Potatodons to a game to win it back.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to Clap Stamp La Cha? Emma is making music with her body as she stamps, claps and sings along to the music! Get ready to cha cha along to Mi Cuerpo!

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programme.desc: Andy travels back in time 220 million years to the time of coelophysis, one of the earliest dinosaurs that hunted in packs and was an expert at fishing.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Did Mojo and Bo paint road lines going in all the wrong directions? Yes they did!

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Ariel helps Ravi at work.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Grandad is supposed to be resting, but when Bluey and Bingo go to visit him, he makes a run for it with the kids and takes them on a madcap adventure into the bush.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: During a hearing test, Peppa's family finds out George needs a hearing aid. After he gets one fitted, George can hear, making everyone happy. Peppa teaches him about sounds.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: PC Panda brings his twin daughters, Peggi and Pandora Panda, to playgroup. They love puzzles and to solve mysteries, just like their dad.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie is feeling lonely during her first visit to chess club, but before long she meets a new friend who helps her turn that desert island feeling into a tropical paradise.

programme.title: Stan and Gran
programme.desc: Stan and Gran are enjoying a beach clean, but the rubbish seems to have a mind of its own! When a yoghurt pot goes walk-about, Stan spies a mystery!

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: A pesky mole causes trouble for Moose when the mole decides that Moose's Wild Man Golf course is the perfect place to build a few molehills.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Inspired by Gemma and her mum smashing their personal best in the ocean, Neville takes on a challenge of his own - teaching his mum, Narelle, how to swim!

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Manta Rays
programme.desc: The Octonauts help a young manta ray find the secret manta ray feeding grounds, but when they finally locate it, the Octonauts become caught in the middle of a dangerous feeding frenzy.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: The villains steal Black Panther's super battery and cause trouble in the city.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies. Bluey learnt to roll over first, but Judo was the first to crawl, so then it became a race to see who was going to walk first!

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: After discovering a crop of colourful little wildflowers sprouting under the Welcome Arch, Flower and Neha think there's only one possible explanation - fairies!

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.sub-title: The Day Ammon Overcame Her Fear
programme.desc: If Ammon gets spooked by a tiny insect, how can she summon the bravery to rescue Cosima and Big Lizard from the river rapids?

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The squirrels learn about how to achieve their ambitions.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Lucy and her dad are having a quiet, relaxing day boating on the lake. They fish out an old, glittery mirror from the bottom of the lake and decide to keep it. Unfortunately, the mirror belongs to a mermaid who needs it back.

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: Blossom tries her best to write a story for great stories camp, but she just can't do it because she's so distracted by a super-annoying-buzzing gnat.

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.sub-title: Save The Bat Dance For Me
programme.desc: Redbird is convinced that nobody likes his eccentric dance moves, but when Toyman traps Robin behind a dance-themed gauntlet, it's up to the rambunctious rally car to dance his way to victory.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Doctor Bluey is needed when Dad gets a very curious X-ray from Nurse Bingo. It seems he has a cat in his tummy, leaving Bluey no choice but to operate immediately.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: A two-part cliff-hanger where everything that Shaun knows and loves comes into question, when he impulsively makes a wish and must face up to some unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Lego Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Lloyd and Wyldfyre lead the escaped dragons in a battle against the Claws while Sora and Arin search for Riyu in hopes of shutting down the Photacs.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Crisis Of Faith And Octopus Aliens
programme.desc: When Mary's faith is shaken by a tragedy in the community, Sheldon becomes an unlikely ally.

programme.title: BtN Newsbreak
programme.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Financial Secret and Fish Sauce
programme.desc: When George Sr asks Sheldon to keep a secret from Mary, the stress of not being honest drives Sheldon to hide out at Tam's for his first sleepover.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: In the first semi-final, four Contenders battle for a coveted place in the grand final.

programme.title: Kids BBQ Championship
programme.desc: The barbecue arena is transformed into a Polynesian paradise and the kids are challenged to make the perfect luau pork dish with a tropical fruit side.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman bring the fun and stakes of a spelling bee into the kitchen by asking the remaining seven kid bakers to make spelling bee word tarts with assigned words on top.

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Merlin stumbles across a secret chamber and accidentally releases a Goblin. The mischievous creature possesses Gaius, leading the once-wise physician to develop a taste for gold, ale and magical jokes.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: A toddler gets akumatised into Gigantitan, a giant baby who crisscrosses Paris looking for a lollipop and destroying everything in his path. Stopping him won't be child's play for Ladybug and Cat Noir.

programme.title: Total DramaRama
programme.desc: After losing countless jobs because of the kids, MacArthur shows up at the school seeking revenge.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Panda bears have a very adorable (and violent!) sneeze, and Panda is no exception. When a Vine video of his very cute sneeze goes viral, Panda becomes a \.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The Bears sneak Charlie into a hospital for medical assistance.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The Bears help Chloe present her project for a college science contest.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: In an endless junkyard the Bears meet Teddi, a sentient teddy bear.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: The Earth Explodes?! A Decisive Kamehameha!
programme.desc: With Goku badly injured, Vegeta steps in to face Frieza. Stronger than ever, Vegeta proves to be a challenge, and an enraged Frieza destroys the planet.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: The 6th Universe's Destroyer! His Name Is Champa!
programme.desc: Vegeta and Goku are continuing their training under Whis when they receive a pair of visitors - Beerus' brother and Whis' sister. After a comparison of culinary delights, Champa challenges Beerus to a universe tournament.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: When Blossom makes a bad call, she becomes afraid to try again.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: Eldon chooses the Internationals duet as Kenzie considers a big opportunity. Olive is conflicted about having her friend back on the team.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: Take a journey through one of the weirdest, wildest periods in English history, featuring the only time that a king has been tried and executed for treason.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Concert Catastrophe
programme.desc: Maudie is crushed when her tickets to a pop concert go missing, especially since it seems likely that she herself has misplaced them.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: The agents throw a surprise party for Ms O.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: When the alarm system at headquarters is triggered, Olive, Otto, Ms O, and Oscar must avoid a series of booby traps in order to shut it off.

programme.title: ABC Kids Programs resume at 4am
programme.desc: ABC Kids programs resume at 4.00am.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: The young Jedi are led on a mission by a new Padawan.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: When the Wolfies start their own band, their sonic howls create new levels of destruction.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Pearl and Periwinkle discover a giant carp wreaking havoc on the Great Plains ecosystem. They call the Octonauts in for backup, but catching that giant fish proves to be much harder than it looks.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Three baby ladybirds, Amber, Emerald and Keith have come to stay at their uncle Gaston's for the day. The baby ladybirds are exhausting! So Ben and Holly help Gaston to keep them entertained.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The voice trumpet leads a game of I Spy where the Teletubbies have to spot different colours - purple, green, yellow and red. What or who can they spot with those colours?

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: When Big Bird gets the hiccups during his rehearsal with the Sesame Street Songbirds, he feels disappointed because he won't be able to sing his solo.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Katerina bakes mozies with Jodi, but rushes and forgets to add the oats. They slow down and make yummy mozies.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Lulu loses her bracelet while playing on the beach. The Bananas try and help find it with their metal detector. They find all sorts of things that they've lost, but not Lulu's bracelet.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Rat has a lot to do this day but he can't do anything until he finds his \.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing is teaching Charlie throwing. Charlie interrupts Bing's explanation about how the fruit was knocked over, and so Flop thinks Charlie did it. Now Bing must tell Flop the truth.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Did someone say pizza? Yes, please. Fizzy and Suds find out how to make this delicious food and join a pizza party.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa's French friend Delphine Donkey comes to stay. Peppa takes Delphine to playgroup where they teach her the Bing Bong Song.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Get ready for an exciting adventure with Lachy and Ponso the Pony! Captain and Evie have accidently told Ponso to go fast, Oh no! Then it's time for some fruity fun with 'Apples and Bananas'.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to Hippity Hop Bouncey Bounce? Kaeng shows us his cool breaking moves! Join in to hop, bounce and jump to the beat of Hop Hippity Hop.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: The time has come for Aunt Lucy to go home, but there's still time for one last adventure - or is there?

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Tunnel Rumbler
programme.desc: When Peter and co mistake the echoey 'rebbits' of a lost Jeremy Fisher for a scary monster, they set about to rid their tunnels of this mysterious invader.

programme.title: PJ Masks Power Heroes
programme.desc: Catboy would rather be a superhero than babysit Tiny Timmy.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Preston needs rescuing from a cable car. Will he stay stuck for long?

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: When Popcorn runs on his hamster wheel all night, he's cranky the next day. But will he nap?

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: When Por Por comes to visit, Flower has a sleepover with her in the restaurant. But Por Por's snoring soon proves to be too much to handle!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa has come to the river for the duck race! Everyone brings their own plastic duck and they each encounter obstacles on the river but luckily Peppa's duck is victorious!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad brings a pair of tenacious tickle crabs home from the beach, nowhere in the house is safe! His only hope of escaping their tickles is with help from his true love.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger and the Baby Pea-Rexes help a young Cornasaurolophus reach the top of a hot volcano where the heat will make its kernels pop and allow a fresh new coat.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Mysterious moving objects and strange sand patterns have Frizzy convinced that Alien Koalas are invading Kangaroo Beach! But Gemma uncovers a much crabbier culprit!

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Ariel helps Ravi at work.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: The Octonauts venture into a dangerous red-hot lava tube to rescue a teeny tiny water bear.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to Hippity Hop Bouncey Bounce? Kaeng shows us his cool breaking moves! Join in to hop, bounce and jump to the beat of Hop Hippity Hop.

programme.title: Play School
programme.desc: Michelle and Matt discover how fun it is to be behind the scenes of the theatre. They put on a dazzling puppet show, try on funny wigs and rehearse a ballet with the toys.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When James tries to win the star globe in a Star Spotter competition, he ends up breaking it and falls into the water chasing it. The team launch an ocean rescue to save the day.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: When Silver Paw invades Lauchie and Scarlett's new playhouse, Jeremy and Deena must save it from becoming her new evil lair.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley must keep Myrtle's pumpkin safe from Speedy the snail.

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Smile School
programme.desc: Nikhil and Jay want the perfect family photo, so they set up a smile school. Nikhil and Jay teach separate classes and have different ideas about how to do the perfect smile.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: Elmo and Gabrielle are playing a game of tic-tac-toe using leaves and rocks found in nature. But when a strong wind blows away Elmo's leaf pieces, Elmo and Gabrielle find something else he can use.

programme.title: Mittens and Pants
programme.desc: When Pants accidentally takes Mittens' new toy, it slowly gets destroyed as he tries to keep it safe.

programme.title: BeddyByes
programme.desc: MeMo and BaBa discover that sometimes all you need is a hug to make things better.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups are pretending to fly so mix up a FLYING ADVENTURE to learn how to really fly. But when Spin can't do it, will he find another way to join his friends in the sky?

programme.title: Ready Eddie Go!
programme.desc: Nina has hurt her arm and is feeling Fed up. Eddie and Akil team up to put on some special activities to cheer up their friend.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Doctor Bluey is needed when Dad gets a very curious X-ray from Nurse Bingo. It seems he has a cat in his tummy, leaving Bluey no choice but to operate immediately.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds spot a storm coming! They find out how to spot the signs, explore different types of storms, and watch as thunder, lightning, and rain become sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: The Makery is acting strangely but this doesn't stop Nim from getting crafty. She creates a plate monster, a watermelon pizza and some decks.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Simon and Evie are in the Wiggly Kitchen looking for Simon's book and come across some sparkles, but they're not sure who they could belong to.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures
programme.desc: Jen has launched several flying camera drones that beam images of animals from across the globe back to Safari World. Mr Hammond notices some strange mud circles above the Atlantic Ocean.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: A hide-and-seek tournament goes wrong when Mojo and Bo accidentally break first prize!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes Peppa and her school friends on a school bus trip to the mountains.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going to Rebecca Rabbit's house today. Rebecca's house is a bit different to Peppa's house, it is inside a hill.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Lou wakes up to find himself on a lily pad in the middle of the lake. He freaks out at first, but his calm inner voice comes to the rescue.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger and the baby Pea-Rexes find the Jungle Park teeming with other baby Vegesaurs, leaving practically no room for them to play. So the gang must get creative to create a game that they can all join in on.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Queen Thistle decides to take a day off, so Holly, Ben, Nanny and the King have to look after the naughty twins Daisy and Poppy for the day. But even all the Elves in the Little Kingdom can't help them stay out of trouble.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Vida moves a piano all the way across Sweetwood to save Pippen's concert!

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: While helping Mum sort through some of the postcards on the fridge, Maddie + Triggs are transported to magical places as they wonder where oh where can Uncle George be?

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: While out for an afternoon stroll with Granny, Maddie + Triggs discover an old bell tower and are surprised to hear a friendly voice welcoming them inside.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: The Town Hall clock has lost its Ding Dong. Myrtle relies on it to remind her to make important mayoral phone calls, Hattie to take her scones out of the oven so they don't burn, and Cynthia to start the train.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: When the Octopod's waterworks are flooded with frightened Humuhumu fish, the Octonauts have to find a way to flush them out!

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Gekko wants to stop a speedy Night Ninja - but his lumbering lizard's just too slow.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee gets a delivery, which arrives in a big cardboard box. The squirrels discover that cardboard boxes can be fun. Roly makes a car out of one, Tag makes a tunnel, then the squirrels make a castle.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Mysterious moving objects and strange sand patterns have Frizzy convinced that Alien Koalas are invading Kangaroo Beach! But Gemma uncovers a much crabbier culprit!

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: The Pontypandy Pioneers bake up a storm to earn their baking badge, but when a greasy oven bursts into flames, it's time to call the rescue team.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Unguarded Garden
programme.desc: When Mr McGregor goes away for the day, Peter can't wait to raid the garden. But the absence of one foe could leave Peter and his little sister at the mercy of another.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: When the rain disrupts a nature walk outdoors, the Nature Explorers head indoors into the green house to stay dry.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Daniel can't wait to show Margaret all of the things they can do to celebrate Thank You Day at the Enchanted Garden.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: After quizzing Nim, The Makery helps her make a wax crayon crocodile, a truck drawing, a monster trifle and a glittery pig game.

programme.title: Play School
programme.desc: Kaeng and Rachel explore the ocean's midnight zone, experimenting with light and glow in the dark paint. They meet artist Garry Purchase to talk about his painting and share Aboriginal stories.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Jump in with 'Kangaroo Jumping'! Evie teaches Eye Spy, Buddy leads the 'Italian Word Song - A A's', and the Wiggles sing 'The Spring Song'.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: Big World!
programme.desc: Thomas finds a way to take part in the Brazilian carnival music.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish and Pola have set up a yard sale, but Tish is having no luck selling anything and, when a customer shows up, Tish fails to win them over.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: The family are going camping, but Tish doesn't want to get her new shoes muddy, which will be difficult when Rosa and Pola tell Tish to look after Bobby.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger can't get a wink of sleep when the baby Pea-Rexes start snoring loudly. But the real problems begin when they start sleepwalking right into harm's way.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Takaya and Abi show their favourite party dance moves. Join in and do the Silly Bounce, Giddy, Orange Juice and Floss and party along to Let's All Dance.

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programme.desc: Andy travels back in time 127 million years, to the time of ornithocheirus, one of the largest flying pterosaurs that ever lived.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo need to clear out Swoppiton before Preston's smelly sandwich stinkplodes!

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Ariel preps Ayanna for picture day.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies. Bluey learnt to roll over first, but Judo was the first to crawl, so then it became a race to see who was going to walk first!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Now that George can hear much better with his new hearing aid, Peppa makes it her mission to show him her favourite sounds! After a day of different sounds, George finally learns Peppa's name!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle teaches the children about Chinese New Year. They learn about sweeping out the old year, and how lucky the colour red is, and together they make a dragon costume to parade up the hill to watch the fireworks.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Dad is struggling to get Maddie to brush her teeth before bed, but a musical visit from her all singing, all dancing pearly whites soon has everyone brushing in perfect harmony.

programme.title: Stan and Gran
programme.desc: Stan, Grace and Brody form a band, but a mystery drummer joins in somewhere across town. Stan and Gran go on a hunt for their invisible bandmate!

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: It's the Annual Pontypandy Bread Baking Competition and Hannah's ambition accidentally causes her to spark a wildfire.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: On a moonlit campout by the lake, the cadets challenge each other to see who can tell the ookiest, spookiest story.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Swashbuckling Swordfish
programme.desc: In search of a mythical sword, Kwazii explores a pirate shipwreck that happens to be guarded by three swashbuckling swordfish!

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Lizard takes the iguanas from Lagarto Island and turns them into his minions.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey is excited to get her own room, but when bedtime comes, she misses Bingo more than she expected and must find a way to stay in touch with her sister.

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: When Por Por comes to visit, Flower has a sleepover with her in the restaurant. But Por Por's snoring soon proves to be too much to handle!

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Big Lizard and Cosima undertake an exciting nighttime mission rehoming a friendly slug that's taken residence in Cosima's bedroom!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels gather all the colours and make their very own rainbow.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.sub-title: Daisy and Poppy Go to the Museum
programme.desc: Daisy and Poppy and their toddler friends are taken on a trip to the big museum by their teacher Mrs Fotheringill.

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: Nevillle has created the most fabulous outfit ever for the neighbourhood fashion show. Only problem, they need to find a most unusually shaped creature to model it.

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: After Nightbike reveals that he's afraid of loud noises, the Batwheels help him overcome his fear so he can stop The Penguin from strealing some valuable cargo.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo, and Mum enjoy playing Keepy-Uppy around the house with their last balloon. When Dad joins in, the game becomes the ultimate test of skill.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: When a cabbage bounces into the field from a passing truck, Shaun decides to use it as a football. But the Naughty Pigs are out to spoil the sheep's game.

programme.title: Lego Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.sub-title: The Battle of the Second Monastery
programme.desc: The Ninja reunites with allies to help the dragons escape the Imperium while Lloyd discovers a mysterious source of energy deep below the city.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Research Study and a Czechoslovakian Wedding Pastries
programme.desc: When Dr Sturgis recommends Sheldon and Missy for a university research study on twins, Mary is unhappy when the test results go to Sheldon's head.

programme.title: BtN Newsbreak
programme.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Seven Deadly Sins and a Small Carl Sagan
programme.desc: Mary clashes with Sheldon's drama teacher, Mr. Lundy, over plans for a Halloween haunted house fundraiser. Georgie falls for a rebellious teenage girl that Sheldon is tutoring.

programme.title: The Slow Mo Guys' Big Adventures
programme.desc: This time The Slow Mo Guys go experimental and look at the amazing world of Chemicals. How amazing is Liquid Nitrogen, and what happens when you detonate it?

programme.title: MythBusters: There's Your Problem!
programme.desc: The MythBusters go loco for motion, as they investigate if various vehicles can be repurposed in completely unintended ways.

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: A fiery confrontation is guaranteed as Gruff enters the field with its fearsome dual flamethrowers. Its target: Will Bales's Hypershock, now completely redesigned for its latest quest for the Giant Nut.

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: When Merlin and Arthur find themselves vastly outnumbered in a tavern brawl, an enigmatic man helps them to victory. The stranger risks his life to protect the prince, and is seriously wounded in the process.

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: The doctors take a dip in the sea to reveal how your sensory neurons detect when something is hot or cold, and they find themselves getting stuck in the mud when they join Her Majesty's Coastguard in Operation Takeover.

programme.title: Operation Ouch! Do Try This at Home
programme.desc: Dr Chris and Dr Xand are back in their kitchen lab! In this episode, the doctors put eye boogers under the microscope and show you how to make edible eye gunk.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: A mysterious masked fencer gets akumatised into Riposte. Armed with her sabre, she wants to get revenge on Adrien, who unintentionally humiliated her. To protect him, Ladybug will have to cross swords with the villain.

programme.title: Total DramaRama
programme.desc: When Chef's mum and Leshawna's grandmother drop their loved ones off at the same time, it kicks off a dangerous competition for who is the most caring mother-figure.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: This episode takes place when the Bears were young cubs! On their way through the desert, the three bears come upon a giant warehouse-it's like an Amazon fulfillment centre.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Chloe and Ice Bear accidentally lose Chloe's prized hoodie.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Tabes helps the Bears rescue Charlie.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: The Bears help Unica return an endangered alien worm to its home.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Combat Matches Are a Go! The Captain Is Someone Stronger Than Goku
programme.desc: Bulma suggests summoning Shenron to find the remaining Super Dragon Balls, but even his power is not enough. Beerus reveals there's a fighter stronger than Goku who's going to join the team of the 7th Universe.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: A Run-Through For the Competition! Who Are the Last Two Members?!
programme.desc: Goku and Vegeta must find two more members for the tournament, but who will be worthy to face the 6th Universe alongside Goku and Vegeta?

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: When Mojo and Barbarus announce their wedding, the girls are convinced that they're up to no good.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: Eldon fights Anthony over which dancer should represent TNS in the Home Field Advantage competition, while Ebby deals with a dilemma.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: Comedian and children's author Rosie Jones is here to help Rattus choose his World Book Day outfit, and discover the gory details behind some favourite children's books!

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Soccer Saga
programme.desc: Kyle asks Maudie and Ava to make a video of his soccer match, but Maudie discovers something about the game is not quite right.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Olive and Otto explain to Ms O how a case went wrong, each in their own way.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: When a young agent in training gets lost in headquarters, Olive and Otto must find him before Ms O finds out.

programme.title: ABC Kids Programs resume at 4am
programme.desc: ABC Kids programs resume at 4.00am.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: Kai sets out to find a lost youngling.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Catboy is taken by the idea of having a cat sidekick.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Some kea birds cause trouble aboard the Octoray when they damage the rotors. With the Octoray quickly heading straight for a mountain, Tweak will have to help with the repairs - over her Octowatch.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The bath tap at the Little Castle is dripping, so the elf plumber is called. It's a bigger job than first expected, but with King and Queen Marigold coming round, there's not much time to get it looking tip-top.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go 'this way, that way' on a Tubby Car journey to the Hidey Hup. The Tubby Spinny goes 'this way, that way' too.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Grover is looking for something that his mommy needs but he just can't remember what it's called.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Daniel is frustrated when Juan Carlos doesn't pretend the same way he does. Dad shows them they can pretend in different ways.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Amy's very excited because she thinks she's found a huge gold nugget in the creek. She gives it to Rat in exchange for gold panning equipment but she can't find anymore gold.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Cafe Rat is ready for business, but Rat is too busy cooking to serve the customers.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing, Sula and Pando are superheroes in the park. Bing rescues Flop from the giant spider but falls off the rope, and Hoppity has an accident. Now they have to rescue Hoppity.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Splish splash, we're going to the swimming pool with Fizzy and Suds. Put on your goggles and swimming cap and dive underwater with our waterlogged bubbles.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go with Mummy Pig to Miss Rabbit's Mummies Fire Engine Service.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Lachy and Simon join The Wiggles for story time, they tell the best stories and love making people laugh, but something is different this time.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to do The Jump and Sway? Strike up the band with Abi and get ready to jump, sway, and dance to Jump, Jump, Jump If You Feel You Want To.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Paddington rescues Pancake Day after Mrs Bird hurts her arms snowboarding and can't make pancakes.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale Of The Frightened Fox
programme.desc: When Peter raids Mr Tod's lair he is trapped inside and must escape, before Mr Tod discovers he is there.

programme.title: PJ Masks Power Heroes
programme.desc: Bastet and Pharaoh Boy lose their tempers with each other which Romeo exploits.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Ted wants more speed, and Bo's rocket gives him a lot more than he expected!

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: When Sunny meets his new baby sister, he's disappointed that she's too little to play.

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: Flower wants new toys, but Penny says she has too many. Flower decides to give away her old stuff and discovers that sharing sparks unexpected fun for herself and all her friends.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: At the gym, Madame Gazelle is teaching the children about martial arts. After, learning how to fall safely, balance and how to throw punches in the right stance, the children earn their white belts!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Mum and Dad describe a made-up world where they can relax without the girls, Bluey and Bingo decide to burst into their fantasy and chase them down. How will Mum and Dad escape?

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: A Mandarinteryx has moved into home base and is causing a big mess. In order to move it along, they have to find it a partner, and quickly.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: What starts as a leisurely sailing trip for Frizzy, Spyke, Big Trev, and Aunty Bev takes a dangerous turn when their boat gets caught on the reef, and they find themselves racing against time!

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Ariel preps Ayanna for picture day.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: When a floating garbage patch endangers a flock of pelicans and other sea creatures, the Octonauts and the birds work together to clean it up.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to do The Jump and Sway? Strike up the band with Abi and get ready to jump, sway, and dance to Jump, Jump, Jump If You Feel You Want To.

programme.title: Play School
programme.desc: Rachael and Luke have fun exploring the wonderful world of radio. They record a song, tell a radio news story and hear a ribbet-ing podcast recorded by the toys.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Hannah starts a scarecrow business, but there is one brave little bird that just isn't scared of her scarecrows.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: The team are on a madcap midnight mission to stop Silver Paw and Pranksy stealing Lauchie's tooth before the tooth fairy arrives.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley must track down the missing library book, 'The Little Book of New Things to Do'.

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Messiest Mango
programme.desc: Jay dreams of being crowned the messiest mango eater ever, ever, ever, but Appa doesn't want drips on the clean floor. So Jay eats his mango in the bath!

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: The Nature Explorers are helping Grandma Nell out in the community garden when they notice a gopher helping itself to a freshly picked carrot. Follow that gopher!

programme.title: Mittens and Pants
programme.desc: Blueberry the tortoise challenges Mittens the kitten to a race. But how can a tortoise win against a kitten?

programme.title: BeddyByes
programme.desc: MeMo comforts BaBa when they lose their precious forever flower.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups find lots of their old things so mix up a SHOP Adventure to sell them all. But when they start to feel nostalgic about the items, will they find another way to let go of what they love?

programme.title: Ready Eddie Go!
programme.desc: It's Eddie's turn to take home the class pet: a gecko! Eddie learns about taking care of another animal, even when he's not in the mood.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo, and Mum enjoy playing Keepy-Uppy around the house with their last balloon. When Dad joins in, the game becomes the ultimate test of skill.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds explore wetlands to find frogs! They discover tadpoles, see how frogs grow and change, and explore their powers like sticky tongues, big eyes, and colour-changing skin!

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Dust in the dressing up clothes gets up Nim's nose, giving The Makery ideas for some interesting makes: tube butterflies, snake sticks and a cheese costume.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Lucia and Tsehay are singing poems in the Wiggly Kitchen and they find a piano. They clap their hands and pat their knees, as it's time for Pat-a-Cake; the Wiggle Town Dancing Water Police are here to help.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures
programme.desc: When Andy accidently breaks Mr Hammond's precious caiman eggshell, he heads to the lakes of Bolivia to find a new one. Andy manages to find a group of baby caimans in a nursery pool.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Mojo has to catch Fabio's runaway balloon fruit, all without waking up poor, exhausted Bo!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family drive to the countryside to go for a walk in the woods.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa has a new pen pal, a little girl donkey from France, named Delphine.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou want to meet Dalvanius, who is very good at camouflage. He says he'll only reveal himself if they promise not to laugh at his ears.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: When an over-confident Ginger gets herself stuck in a tall tree, the baby-Pea Rexes split up to recruit the help of the three tallest Vegesaurs to get her down.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Nanny Plum takes the Fairy children for a Nature Class in the woods, and bumps into the Wise Old Elf who is teaching a Nature Class to the Elf children.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Sunny is so nervous Baby Mouse will fall, that he doesn't want her to take her first steps!

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: While watching TV, Maddie + Triggs keep annoying each other with their noisy snacking! But luckily Dad is on hand to help them remember the things they like about each other.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: While out hillwalking with Mum, Maddie + Triggs meet a new friend who teaches them all about yodelling - an ancient method of communicating over long distances.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley is called to help setup a football pitch so the children can play a match. It's Dino United vs Lunch City!

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Spider Crab
programme.desc: Kwazii is spooked when he spots what looks like a giant underwater spider! But it turns out to be a very old Spider Crab who needs the Octonauts' help!

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Night Ninja sets up a school for villains.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The squirrels are helping Duggee in the garden when Tag makes friends with a caterpillar. This caterpillar is very hungry, so Tag feeds her all the vegetable leaves they've been picking.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: What starts as a leisurely sailing trip for Frizzy, Spyke, Big Trev, and Aunty Bev takes a dangerous turn when their boat gets caught on the reef, and they find themselves racing against time!

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Despite constant interruptions, Mandy tries to stay calm and earn her yoga badge - until disaster strikes and she needs to be rescued from a cliff ledge!
